title: Provision ML Training Cluster
description: Provision a GPU cluster for the data science team for quarterly model retraining. Requires 4x g4dn.xlarge instances in us-east-1a, attached to the ml-workloads VPC, with 500GB EBS volumes each. Budget tag: cost-center=DS-2024-Q1.

title: Deploy Payment Service v2.4.1
description: Deploy payment-service:v2.4.1 to production ECS cluster. Rolling deployment with 25% max unavailable. Requires approval from payment-team-lead before execution. Blue-green cutover on final step.

title: Scale Read Replicas for Month-End Batch
description: Add 3 RDS read replicas to the reporting cluster ahead of month-end financial batch jobs scheduled for 23:00 UTC on the 31st. Use db.r6g.2xlarge. Auto-decommission after batch window.

title: Decommission Legacy Analytics Servers
description: Decommission 3 legacy bare-metal analytics servers (analytics-legacy-[01-03]) that have had zero traffic for 45 days. Final snapshots required. CMDB and DNS records must be updated.

title: Provision Isolated Dev Environment
description: Provision a complete isolated dev environment for the new fraud-detection team. Needs its own VPC (10.20.0.0/16), 2 t3.medium app servers, 1 db.t3.medium RDS PostgreSQL instance, Redis ElastiCache, and NAT gateway.
